artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a long-handled wicker collection basket overflowing not with coins but with rattling translucent soul-orbs glowing cold gold, tilted toward the viewer in dramatic foreshortening. Candlelight gleams off the woven rim; ashen pews recede into smoky black behind, the doomsday clock tower a dim looming shape, sacred and sinister, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: The Collection Basket of Souls
text:
Whenever a creature dies, put a soul counter on The Collection Basket of Souls.
{2}, {T}, Remove three soul counters: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield, then put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock. The basket gives back, for a tithe.
flavorText: Pass it down the pew. Mind the souls. They rattle.
